mapper.select: SELECT * FROM report_metadata WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND is_deleted = false
SELECT * FROM report_metadata WHERE id = #{reportId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND is_deleted = false
SELECT * FROM report_metadata WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report_metadata (tenant_id, name, description, schema_version, created_by) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{schemaVersion}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE report_metadata SET name = #{name}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND is_deleted = false
UPDATE report_metadata SET is_deleted = true, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND is_deleted = false
